description: KB-628d — CLI Commands, Pi Extension, and Engine Integration. Integrate the Missions system into the CLI with mission management commands, extend the pi extension with mission tools for chat-based interaction, and modify the engine scheduler to handle slice activation and auto-advance. See `.kb/tasks/KB-628d/PROMPT.md` for full specification.

log.outcome: The specification is comprehensive, well-structured, and ready for implementation. The mission clearly bridges the Missions data layer (KB-632) with user-facing interfaces through CLI commands, pi extension tools, and scheduler/executor integration. All context files exist and the referenced patterns are correctly identified. The dependency on KB-632 is appropriately called out and the file scope accurately reflects what needs to be created versus modified.
